feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Master Data Governance
feed.subtitle: SAP Master Data Governance Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP MDG: I can't create a validation rule after deleting the existing one
entry.content:
Hi all,

could you help me please with this case:

I had a validation rules in SAP MDG for BP, but for some reason I deleted the existing CHECK_AD_POSTAL (function), because all afterwards created rules  did not work. So I deleted it and marked it for deletion with the hope that I can create a new one and begin my journey about Creating Validation Rules from the beginning.

Now my problem is, if I try to create a function with the name: CHECK_AD_POSTAL I get an error message that: Name CHECK_AD_POSTAL has already been used.

Could you tell me please what shold I do so that I can create again a function for the entity AD_POSTAL?

Thank you in advance for your help! 

BR
Umar

entry.title: Maintenance of KNB1 - PERNR via MDC not possible anymore?
entry.content:
Dear all,

my I ask if the field KNB1-PERNR is in scope for MDC in MDG on-prem? It was maintained in a scope before and was deleted. Trying to re-insert it into the scope, but it is not selectable. I did try to find official information regarding this field, but was not able to find any.

Thank you in advance for any help, hint and official document.

Best regards
Mauri

entry.title: SAP Master Data Governance (Supplier or Customer) - Creation of Contact Persons
entry.content:
Good Day, valued SAP Experts,

we have a requirement to create contact persons in a dedicated Business Partner Gruping (Z****). We are Using MDG on SAP S/4 HANA. Creation of Contact Persons together with the Main Business Partner (Customer or Supplier) works fine, however Contact Persons are always created in the same BP-Grouping as the main Business Partner.

 

Scenario Despription

While creating our Main Business Partner, MDG allows to simultaneously create a contact person (similar to the Fiori App Manage BP). This works fine. If we are now creating a new Customer or Cuspplier (or both) in the Business Partner Grouping (Z1**), we can simultaneounsly a contact person. That works fine. But the Contact person is also created with the same Busness Partner Grouping (Z1**).

The requirement, however, is that all contact persons are created in one single Business Partner Grouping (ZX**), so independant of the Grouping of the Main Business Partner.

We can not find any customizing to support this requirement. Did anyone have the same requirement in the past and how did you solve it (ideally of course in or close to SAP standard).

Any Feedback is well appriceiated.

Best Regards

 


Acram

entry.title: How to Call Web Service BusinessPartnerSUITEBulkReplicateConfirmation_Out in System Caller BADI
entry.content:
We have a requirement to sent CR status , User details and few other details in  BusinessPartnerSUITEBulkReplicateConfirmation_Out when CR is Rejected.

So, how to call this BusinessPartnerSUITEBulkReplicateConfirmation_Out Web service in System Caller Badi and how to modify Webservice note during CR Rejected.

entry.title: Encountering issues while activating the BP data model
entry.content:
Hi There,

While activating the BP data model, I encountered an error stating, "Field symbol has not been assigned yet." I added a custom entity to the BP model while the BP data model activation was in display mode. I deleted the custom entity and attempted to activate the model again, but the error is not resolved. I also removed locks for all users to check for any locked objects, but the error remains unresolved.

Details of the error:

  • Runtime error: GETWA_NOT_ASSIGNED
  • ABAP Program: CL_USMD_MDF_MODEL_GENERATOR===CP    

 

 Kind regards,

 Meghana.

entry.title: Service groups of MDI Product does not appear in /IWFND/V4_ADMIN tcode
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am doing setup instructions for MDI using that https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/d761beaeedd949c18213f449f4617250/32afd67be8dc4e66890171e9924098f6.html?locale=en-US&q=master+data+integration. 
In our scenario we are trying to do replicate product master data S/4HANA to Public Cloud system. So I want to prepare our S/4HANA system as provider. On "Publish OData V4 Service Groups" part there are some services and service groups for MDO and MDI. When I opened the /IWFND/V4_ADMIN tcode, left side of the screen shows us published service groups. I did not see any of the service groups. Then I think I need to publish them. I pressed "Publish Service Groups" button and searched as follows. 

I came across the following pop-up.

Is there anything to do for seeing that service groups in the /IWFND/V4_ADMIN tcode. Or is there a step I'm doing wrong?

Thanks in advance for any input.

Berk.

entry.title: Batch Job does not trigger replication to C4C
entry.content:
Hi - we have a (custom program) job that updates Sales blocks using our dunning process (KNVV-LIFSD). But once the update has been completed on the BP, it does not trigger the replication to downstream system like C4C. 

Note that if we update via MDG or BP tcode, replication happens without issues. How do we ensure that any batch jobs that updates master data triggers the replication?

Thanks in advance!

Marc

entry.title: MDG-M Standard Fields are not editable
entry.content:
Hello,

I am experiencing an issue with UIBB Standard Fields. In the Basic Data section under General Data, I can maintain certain fields. However, in the Plant: Purchasing section under General Data, all fields are read-only. I have already checked the UIBB settings, and they appear to be correct.

I have included screenshots comparing a field from Basic Data and a field from Plant: Purchasing.

Thank you!

Best regards,

ReiBasic DataMaterial Type FieldPlant PurchasingPurchasing Group Field

entry.title: Dynamic Workflow BAdI in IF_USMD_SSW_SYST_METHOD_CALLER is not working
entry.content:
Hello

I am implementing a dynamic workflow using a System Method BAdI. I have already created a service name and assigned it as a filter value in the BAdI.

(The other code reads data from the change request and I am only permitted to share the condition code below.) Here is the code within the BAdI:

 CONSTANTS:
    lc_action_approve TYPE usmd_crequest_action VALUE '03',
    lc_action_reject  TYPE usmd_crequest_action VALUE '04'.

*Check MBRSH
  CASE ls_material-mbrsh.
    WHEN 'M'.
      ev_action = lc_action_reject.
    WHEN OTHERS.
      ev_action = lc_action_approve
      .
  ENDCASE.

I have placed a debugger within the code, and I can confirm that the condition is being evaluated. However, after the system processes ev_action (e.g., lc_action_approve), the workflow does not proceed to the next step. Conversely, if ev_action equals lc_action_reject, the M2 step is not triggered.

Thank you!

Best regards,

Rei

Filter ValueNon User agent TableService NameSingle Value Table

entry.title: Request for SAP S/4HANA Plant Maintenance Fiori Demo Videos & Resources
entry.content:
Hi everyone, I need to demonstrate key SAP S/4HANA Plant Maintenance processes using the Fiori Demo environment, and we already have access to the SAP Demo system. Could anyone help by sharing reference videos, online resources, or YouTube links that include data models and step-by-step demonstrations? Any insights, links, or references to hands-on demonstrations would be highly appreciated! Specifically, we are looking for Fiori demo videos covering the following topics:

L4 Business Process Topics (BPD Topics):

  • Phase In / Phase Out of Equipment
  • Non-Routine Maintenance (Reactive, Minor, Emergency Maintenance)
  • Routine/Preventive Maintenance
  • Refurbishment (In-House / External)
  • Condition-Based Maintenance
  • Maintenance Planning
  • Resource Scheduling Management
  • Shutdown Maintenance
  • Routine Maintenance (Work Clearance Management)                                                                            

    Thanks in advance.

entry.title: MDG. How to turn off auto replication of materials
entry.content:
Dear SAP community,

Currently we have the following situation: When changing a material in MM02 or using MASS, IDOCs are automatically created and replication is performed. For change requests, the replication step is not added in BRF+, but replication is still performed automatically. If I add a replication step in BRF+, it is executed twice when the request is activated (two IDOCs are created with a time difference of less than a second for one material). How can I disable automatic replication, which is triggered by changes in MM02 or MASS? A similar question has already been raised, but the solution was not written: SAP MDG auto-replicating material to ECC via MM02 ... - SAP Community

entry.title: Data model enhancement with UI and update in custom field in database table but000
entry.content:
Facing issues with updating custom fields in the BUT000 table in SAP ABAP, specifically within the Master Data Governance (MDG) framework.
DATA MODEL ENHANCEMENT ALONG WITH update field in but000 table incorrect updating of custom target.
Update the .INCLUDE CI_EEW_BUT000
ZZTARGET ZTARGET
ZZSUPPLIER_HQ ZZ_DE_SUPPLIER_HQ
ZZSUPPLIER_DU ZZ_DE_SUPPLIER_DU
ZZSUPPLIER_GU ZZ_DE_SUPPLIER_GU
Redefine necessary methods such as SAVE_BUSINESS_PARTNER_ACTIVE updated the custom fields.
in MDG while update but000 table Non Match case working fine,but match case not getting update in sap abap some fields are getting x some time it is empty.

entry.title: Font Size in UIBB in sap mdg fpm
entry.content:
HI Experts,

I have a doubt as below and kindly suggest me the same. Thanks.

I have 2 uibb as below. I just want to know how to keep the same font size even when a block is collapse or not.

 

Regards,

Karthik S

entry.title: To save data dynamically into a database table within an FPM
entry.content:
Hi Experts,
I am unable  to save the data into database dynamically within FPM.

Requirement: I will provide  data in a list component ,While clicking on new button a new row need to be added and on clicking save button the record need to be saved into database.

Issue: I did hardcode for getting new row here I am getting an empty row while i am editing and adding new data to and save it . The row that came is disappearing and not saving into table.

Kindly help me to sort out this issue.

UI Floorplan Manager for Web Dynpro ABAP 

@AnudeepGoparaju

entry.title: Custom UIBB Not Visible in sap mdg fpm
entry.content:
HI Experts,

I have an issue as below and request to guide me on the same. Thanks.

I have a custom uibb in mdg for Customer where OVP is mapped with personalization.

When we create a customer, custom uibb is not visible in screen but when we do a 'reset to default' then the custom uibb is visible.

I close the window completely, then i create a new customer...again the custom uibb is not available.

Can i know the start place where all the uibb begins in terms of some standard class/methods.

On top it, do i need to do any additional settings in system for personalization. Thanks.

 

 

Regards,

KArthik S

entry.title: MDG Consolidation using BP SOA service
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have one question on MDG Consolidation process. We have 5 ECC source systems from where we need to load the vendor data(BP) into MDG Hub on S/4 HANA. I am trying to know how to use MDG Consolidation in this scenario using BP SOAP webservice. I have gone through a few blogs(Consolidation with SAP Master Data Governance on SAP S/4HANA page 41 and 42) but things are not clear.

It would be a great help if any of you could provide me with any comprehensive step by step document or any other help so that, it can help me figure out the final approach on the consolidation strategy from the said multiple ECC source systems.

I am trying to understand the following:

1) How will SOAP webservice trigger the consolidation steps automatically?

2) Is there any external system(any ETL tool) which will have to be deployed here to create the SOA message payload after extracting vendor data from the multiple source systems and publish that SOA payload for MDG/S4 HANA system to consume to trigger MDG Consolidation steps?

3) How will the data extraction take place from multiple source systems in this scenario?  

4) Is there any background job to be scheduled at MDG side which will read the SOA payload and trigger the MDG Consolidation steps?

5) In this case, will SOA payload populate all the Consolidation Source tables?

Any pointer in this regard would be much appreciated.

Thanks!!

entry.title: Ship to party
entry.content:
Hi,

In SAP Public cloud; There are multiple Ship-To Parties for a single customer how can we upload them without maintaining manually, one by one, against each Sold-To Party?

To explain further: let's say Customer A has 20 Ship-To Parties. How can we upload them efficiently and save time? I’ve already uploaded 100+ Ship-To Parties into the system, but now assigning each one individually to the corresponding Sold-To Party feels like a very time-consuming task.

Is there no shortcut or quicker method to assign these Ship-To Parties in bulk?

Best regards,

entry.title: New company code as a copy of an old one
entry.content:
Hello, I have been trying to create a new company code, using an old one as a template. Any way that I can copy the company details + pricing conditions and all facilities to a new one? We are moving to a new currency, Bulgaria changes to Euro and we need to set up our systems good. 


Thank you for your answer,
Nikola Nikolov

entry.title: SAP MDG Parallel processing in Mass processing of data
entry.content:
Hello Gurus,

We have a requirement to configure Consolidation and mass processing using Change Request for client, version 2023. For mass process, they have requirement to process multiple CRs for same entity ( which I understand is parallel processing). However when I am creating configID for activation of material using CR, I cannot select my CR type(which is configured for parallel processing). I am using copy of CR type MATL0A, Business Activity MATA. Kindly guide how can I achieve this requirement of activating material with CR for mass processing using parallel processing.

Thank you,

Shweta

entry.title: BRF+ in SAP MDG: Unable to get BP Central Data fields while adding condition in validation rule.
entry.content:
Hi,

I am configuring a Validation using BRF+ in SAP MDG for the Business Partner (BP) data model.

I am using the standard function CHECK_BP_CENTRL under the application FMDM_MODEL_BP for validations. However, while trying to define a rule condition, I’m unable to find the Central Data fields in the context (but Change Request Type is available).

What I’ve done:

  • Created a Rule Set and Rule under Check Entity for BP.

  • Assigned the function CHECK_BP_CENTRL.

  • When trying to define a condition by creating a rule under Assigned Ruleset, I opened the Context Query, but Central data fields of BP are not available.

Screenshot attached for clarity. 

 

How can I make sure that the BP Central Data fields are available in the BRF+ context? 

Any documentation links, screenshots, or guidance from your experience would be very helpful.

Thanks in advance for your support!
